280 I1550_NRGNC_BLADR_CD I1550_NRGNC_BLADR_CD I1550 Active Diagnoses: Neurogenic Bladder Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of neurogenic bladder in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
